node.statement: COMPUTATION C2 (Hamiltonian assembly): H_{alpha,beta} = (1/2)sum_{m1+m2=m3+m4} <m1,m2|V|m3,m4> * <alpha|a^dag_{m1}a^dag_{m2}a_{m4}a_{m3}|beta> where the two-body matrix element uses CG decomposition [P04-Fano eq (24)] and pseudopotentials V_J^{(S)} [P04-Fano eq (25)]. H is real symmetric, stored sparse CSC. Nonzeros per row: O(N^2 * N_orb). JULIA: hamiltonian.jl builds this sparse matrix.
